findings.title: content-poster cron job in error state
findings.mechanism: content-poster has status=error AND lastRunStatus=error. consecutiveErrors=1. Last error: 'cron: job interrupted by gateway restart'. 1 of 20 live jobs in error. Not architecture-owned.

findings.recommended_fix: Next content-poster run (June 8 08:00 Berlin) will likely self-clear. If error persists after next run, investigate content-poster payload.

findings.mechanism: 20 live jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled. Persisted file has 21 entries (20 unique names) — one stale disabled marketing-pulse duplicate coexists with the enabled marketing-pulse entry. Not a live issue.

findings.recommended_fix: No action needed. Persisted duplicate is harmless.
